reviews.review_description: I keep on searching for more of these. Please please please make some more. Not a lot of replayability, but it's totally worth it for the experience and to have it, to show others. It's a great way to introduce vr to people. I sit and swing a bit in a hammock so it's especially immersive - ya gotta try it that way, I felt like I was gonna fall out a few times!

I’ve had Epic Roller Coasters for years and love it. This one could be great? I agree with another reviewer, the addition of haptics would make all the difference. Also, the cart being closer to the track or floor level would make the experience so much better. Not sure if I’m keeping it yet, maybe, I’d like to see how responsive the developers are in listening and implementing the requested updates. The game was inexpensive, but I won’t purchase any add ons until it’s improved.

developer_response.body: We have added haptics now and would love your thoughts. Appreciate the feedback!

reviews.review_description: iN MANY PARTS MY HEAD WAS TO CLOSE TO THE ROOF AND AT TIME THROUGH THE ROOF.  i liked the other one better.  This one wasn't great IMHO.  Graphics in other coaster games are better.

I bought the bundle with both. These are my third and fourth roller coaster games/experiences that I have purchased on my oculus.  I have to say they are my favorites. The graphics are much better in my opinion. One review stated that one was lacking the sound of the  roller coaster itself, and that’s true,  but that’s an easy fix for the creators. ￼ each one consist of just one ride, but they are pretty long ￼👍👍

I purchased a few apps from this developer including this and another rollercoaster.  Overall I enjoyed my time in this app but it lacks critical features.  I own every coaster on Epic Roller Coasters and that app provides a feature-set I expect.  Specifically, this app has no haptic feedback at all which greatly decreases immersion.  I have no idea why the dev would omit such a basic feature, but it's absent.  Also, the sound needs quite a bit of work.  You hear almost no sound at all from the rollercoaster--as in, you can't hear the sound the coaster would make whilst moving on the track.  It's very odd and absolutely detracts from immersion.  The course seems well thought out and the assets and art-design are more than acceptable.  There are LONG portions of the ride where you're not even on a rollercoaster--your "car" just glides down hallways.  I'd happily upgrade my rating if the developer adds haptic feedback and adds some actual coaster soundFX.  The devs might have some future success if they don't cut these corners as there is minimal competition outside of Epic Roller Coasters.  In it's current state this coaster/app is lacking.  Please update it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We have now added haptics :) Give it a try and let us know what you think.

reviews.review_description: Over the top. Excellent. 12 stars out of 10. Next level. Lots of surprises. Goes on and on. Amazing. Wonderful.

I'm a huge fan of Rollercoasters in VR. This absolutely nails it. The amount of different scenes incorporated in this coaster is fantastic. The speeds you reach definitely add a great adrenaline rush. I look forward to more content in the future!

developer_response.body: This is great to hear! We also have another rollercoaster with two different modes, Rollercoaster Thor's Hammer. If you search for rollercoaster you will see it.

reviews.review_description: I went right into the game didn’t see anything by slowing the speed down. I had a severe case of motion sickness I mean it was just too rabbit. I’m going to explore the slowest speed down and if I can’t, then I have to get a refund.
Really great fun and lots of different environmnets. Great value for money.
